content.problemStatement:
Write a Player class containing height and weight as attributes. Also this class contains a BMI method which returns an integer BMI of this person. 

### Note

```cpp
BMI = floor((weight)/(height^2))

Here,  floor() function returns the largest integer that is smaller than or equal to the value passed as the argument.
```
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat: First line contains two integers height and weight respectively.
content.outputFormat: Print bmi on first line as ouput.
